user.title: Security Assistant — Setup
user.description: Enter the NetFlow listener address and your internal network ranges. All advanced settings (scanner, DNS proxy, enrichment, baseline, etc.) can be configured from the Security Assistant panel after setup.

init.title: Security Assistant — Listener Settings
init.description: Update the NetFlow listener address and internal networks. All advanced settings are available from the Security Assistant panel → Settings.

trigger_scan.name: Trigger active host scan
trigger_scan.description: Immediately run a full active network scan (ping + port scan) for all known and observed IPs, without waiting for the next scheduled interval.

blacklist_refresh.name: Force refresh threat intel blocklists
blacklist_refresh.description: Immediately clear all loaded threat-intel entries and re-download every configured blocklist URL.

nvd_refresh.name: Refresh NVD vulnerability database
nvd_refresh.description: Flush the local NVD CVE cache and re-fetch fresh vulnerability data from the National Vulnerability Database.
